about.en: KuCoin Token is the native utility token of the KuCoin exchange ecosystem. KCS is associated with exchange benefits such as fee discounts, holder incentives, and platform programs. It is one of the better-known centralized-exchange tokens in crypto markets.
about.es: KuCoin Token es el token de utilidad nativo del ecosistema del exchange KuCoin. KCS esta asociado a beneficios del exchange como descuentos en comisiones, incentivos para holders y programas de la plataforma. Es uno de los tokens de exchange centralizado mas conocidos en los mercados cripto.
